results.title: Resolving Database Read-Replica Timeouts
results.content: If read-replicas are timing out, check the connection pool size in PgBouncer. A sudden spike in analytics queries can exhaust the pool. Increase pool_size to 200 in pgbouncer.ini.

results.title: Identifying Slow Analytics Queries
results.content: To find slow queries causing dashboard load issues, run: SELECT pid, now() - pg_stat_activity.query_start AS duration, query FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE state = 'active' ORDER BY duration DESC;

results.title: Scaling the Database Layer
results.content: When CPU utilization hits 80% on the primary, it is recommended to scale out by adding an additional read-replica and routing all SELECT queries to the replica endpoints.

results.title: Handling HTTP 500 Errors on Login
results.content: Login HTTP 500 errors are usually caused by the Auth Service losing connection to the Redis session cache. Restart the redis-cluster pods to resolve.

results.title: Configuring Application Timeouts
results.content: The default HTTP client timeout is 30 seconds. This can be increased by setting the HTTP_TIMEOUT environment variable in the deployment manifest.
